name: Bruce Wayne
description:
Kissing in a closet, hiding away from guests at his company party | REQUEST

After being apart for quite some time, Wayne Enterprises throws a company party to celebrate the succesful launch of a new product. A perfect time to see you, and to hide away from his guests to scratch an itch he's been having for days.


All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. When leaving feedback, please keep that in mind. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes an issue I can't fix, or is simply there to hate, it will be removed.


I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.

CREATOR NOTES: Here's another request. I actually used this version of Bruce Wayne for another OC of mine, which can be pretty confusing if you see the other character. This character is different from Jamie Reed, I just used the same character for his looks. While I'm working on finishing requests, please try to keep in mind that I will NOT be doing every single one. It depends on how well the character is explained, or how well I know about the character of the franchise.

I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.
Request bots here (google forms)
creator: hangovertwins
